name: Anterior uveitis
description: Inflammation of the uveal tract in which the primary site of inflammation is the anterior chamber.

name: negative regulation of nucleotide-binding domain, leucine rich repeat containing receptor signaling pathway
description: "Any process that stops, prevents, or reduces the frequency, rate, or extent of a nucleotide-binding domain, leucine rich repeat containing receptor signaling pathway (NLR) pathway." [GOC:add]

name: negative regulation of nucleotide-binding oligomerization domain containing 2 signaling pathway
description: "Any process that stops, prevents, or reduces the frequency, rate, or extent of the nucleotide-binding oligomerization domain containing 2 (NOD2) pathway." [GOC:add]
